name: Darling Field
description: Come play pickleball at Darling Field in Gloversville, NY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Fulton County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Fulton County YMCA in Johnstown, NY! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Knox Junior High School
description: Knox Junior High School is a place to play pickleball in Johnstown, NY. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Pickle in the Park
description: Pickle in the Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Northampton, NY. There are 6 asphalt courts. 1 is indoors and 5 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Open play overlaps with scheduled club member playing sessions

name: YMCA Gloversville
description: YMCA Gloversville is a place to play pickleball in Gloversville, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.
